arabic: كَشَفَتْ دِرَاسَةٌ حَدِيثَةٌ عَنِ ارْتِفَاعٍ مَلْحُوظٍ فِي مُعَدَّلَاتِ التَّلَوُّثِ الْجَوِّيِّ فِي الْمُدُنِ الصِّنَاعِيَّةِ الْكُبْرَى.
translation: Nedavna studija otkrila je primjetan porast stope zagađenja zraka u velikim industrijskim gradovima.
translationEn: A recent study revealed a notable rise in air pollution rates in major industrial cities.
